Comments:
Big descent with a STOP sign half way down which this segment would encourage you to ignore. 

 Normally I wouldn't report a segment, but a couple years ago on this same downhill I hit a car at the intersection (Oakland @ Park Ave) in the middle of this segment and was hospitalized -thankfully only a broken bone and bike but could have died if landed differently. 

Want to prevent others from the same risk.
